# <a id="_izy97s220nu0"></a>__Why Choose Us?__

Are you tired of ineffective marketing campaigns that fail to deliver results? At Sparkle Media, we believe in using data\-driven strategies and creative thinking to drive real success for our clients\. With a team of experienced professionals and a proven track record of success, we are confident that we can help your business reach its goals\.

Up for the challenge? Reach out to us\!

# <a id="_xdszn5xhld7"></a>__What We Do__

To help businesses of all sizes succeed in the digital world by being the one stop destination for all your digital needs

# <a id="_eh6o3jxlrs9p"></a>__About Us__

We are a digital marketing startup dedicated to helping businesses of all sizes succeed in the online world\.

Our team of experienced professionals has a passion for all things digital, and we are constantly staying up\-to\-date on the latest trends and techniques to ensure that our clients are always ahead of the curve\.

We offer a full range of digital, creative & tech services, from photography and branding to digital marketing and upto website & software development 'this sentence can be changed as per the services or how we want to showcase'\. Our goal is to help businesses like yours get noticed online, attract more customers, and drive growth\.

We believe that every business is unique, and we take the time to get to know your business and your goals before crafting a customized marketing strategy that delivers results\.

We look forward to the opportunity to work with you and help your business thrive\.

to help businesses of all sizes and nature succeed in the digital world

__Our Approach__

Research 

A digital marketing specialist will always research your competitors as well as your customers to produce better content\. 

Assess

The competitors' and your brand's current situation needs to be assessed to have a thorough understanding of what needs to be done and what needs to be avoided\. 

Strategize

Then a well\-structured strategy needs to be sketched out, with risks analyzed in all aspects and contingency plans ready\. 

Implement

And it is a matter of kick\-starting an exemplary digital journey for your brand in an extraordinary way\.

__Content Marketing__

__Create content that advertise your brand with a story\!__

Content marketing is one of the trickiest areas\.

This is where your brandΓÇÖs entire marketing relies on\. From social media contents, website contents, blog, search engine headlines to everything that represents your brand from voice to visual\. Everything is content and that content needs to be top notch if you expect people to stop, engage and convert\!

__Social Media Content\-__

__Paid Media Management__

__Lack of patience? Wanna rush results on social media?__

__LetΓÇÖs boost the post and speed of growth\!__

Social media advertising is a smart way to grow your business and generate leads\. With a diverse range of platforms to target all ages, paid social provides a unique and extremely in\-depth way of targeting that no other marketing channel can provide\.

__How do we do it?__

┬╖         Data\-driven social strategy

Using a data\-led approach we determine the right audiences and platforms which align with your business objectives\. Our finessed audience selection process taps into a world of new opportunities to give you a competitive edge\.

┬╖        Campaign alignment

We seamlessly fit our paid social strategy into your wider digital strategy for a fully integrated campaign\. Sometimes this means running seasonal promotion\-led campaign bursts, and other times it may be an always\-on awareness message to grow brand visibility\.

┬╖        Ad copy and creative

By understanding your objectives and assigning the relevant platforms for your campaign, we select the best ad types for optimum performance\. From carousels to video ads, we do it all, including creative design and carefully crafted copy\.

__Search Engine Optimisation__

__Be Found and Visible on Search Engines\!__

Why do you need SEO?

68% of online experience starts from search engine

53\.3% of website traffic are organic traffic

92\.9% of traffic is generated by Google Search, Images and Maps

 

We do full\-on\-full SEO for your website or pick the one you like\!

__ON\-PAGE OPTIMISATION__

The content on your website pages must match the intent and expectations of users so Google ranks your page high in the search\. WeΓÇÖll create unique content and make expert optimisations to drive new traffic and clicks\.

__TECHNICAL SEO__

There are hundreds of elements that fall under a technical SEO remit from site speed to re\-directs\. WeΓÇÖll identify and fix the technical elements of your site to give you a solid SEO foundation for further growth

__MEDIA PLACEMENTS & LINKS__

High\-quality links from reputable sources will increase the trust of your brand in the eyes of Google and your target audience\. WeΓÇÖll secure authority\-boosting placements to generate impressions, clicks and online sales\.

Type of SEO you can pick:

__E\-Commerce SEO__

E\-commerce SEO will bring in the right leads who have a direct interest in your brand\. Save time and money by targeting a specific niche\! 

__Local SEO__

People often look for services around them that are more convenient for them\. Even if you provide service globally you can still attract visitors by being available to them on the local search results\.

__Search Engine Marketing__

__Appear on your interested and intended audiences search\!__

HereΓÇÖs to the expertise that comes beyond limitations for your investment in search engine marketing\. LetΓÇÖs reach beyond the limits\.

Agencies such as Sparkle Media have the ability to help your business increase its digital presence and engage with the potential leads that would actually bring an ROI to your business\.

Based on our experience, PPC is more of a digital race you have with your competitors using the keywords to reach your targets\. You pay the highest bid price for the search term when a user clicks through, which places your ad at the top of the search results\.

On the other hand, through display networks you can raise awareness and reach a large number of audience for a smaller investment compared to search ads\.

When the clicks of your consumers result in conversions and purchases, you get a greater impact on your money\.

 

__What are the ways you can benefit with Search Engine Marketing?__

__Programmatic Ads__

We help you reach leads beyond what search engines can detect and help you display your brand in places that help broaden your audience and website traffic\.

 

__Google Search Ads__

We help your brand appear to the customers that intend to search for similar products or services that your business provides\.

__Google Display Network__

With the right strategy, you can make your brand visible in places where your audience with interests wanders on the internet\.

__Google Video Ads__

A good video ad shouldnΓÇÖt feel like an ad\. It should be an experience that viewers enjoy\. An experience that develops subconscious attraction toward your brand and possibly even triggers immediate action\.

__Shopping Ads__

Google Shopping has become a profitable marketing channel for many eCommerce businesses\. Formerly known as ΓÇ£Product Listing AdsΓÇ¥\. Whether youΓÇÖre a small business just starting out or an established brand, we can successfully set up and manage a successful Google Shopping campaign that generates profitable returns\.

__E\-Mail Marketing__

	

Email marketing is one of the most powerful tools you have for keeping customers engaged and interacting with your brand\. But it can be difficult to figure out how to get started and make sure you're getting results\.

The best way to reach your audience is to start by figuring out who they are\. Are they looking for information on a particular product or service? Do they want updates on current sales? Do they want help finding their next vacation destination?

Once you know their needs, it's time to develop an email marketing strategy that incorporates those needs\. You can send emails at any time of day, but sending them during certain times of year can help boost engagement with specific types of people\. For example, if you sell skincare products, sending emails during the winter months might be more beneficial than sending them in summer when people are outside more often\.

One of the most important things about choosing an email marketing provider is making sure that they are able to deliver content consistently across platforms like Gmail, Outlook or the mobile app version of an email client \(like Mailbox\)\. The best way to do this is by using a platform that allows them to sync up multiple accounts so that all of your messages are sent out from one place instead of having different systems looking after each one separately

__Branding__

__Mark your brand in the viewers mind\!__

__Your brand tells a story\.__

ItΓÇÖs not just a logo; itΓÇÖs a blend of visual design, spoken language, even actions, all coming together to form a coherent idea in the minds of the audience of your brandΓÇÖs values and personality\.

So how do you make sure your branding is telling the right story?

Whether starting from scratch or rebranding, a well\-thought\-out brand strategy is a cornerstone for any business wanting to make a lasting impression\. 

We immerse ourselves in your world to find out everything about you, what drives you and what makes you unique, as well as your market, your consumers and your competitors\. ItΓÇÖs then down to the design of your brand to communicate what youΓÇÖre all about\. A great brand identity is always consistent with your core values but is flexible enough to adapt to different situations\. Get this right, and youΓÇÖre on your way to telling a great story that people will remember\.

__Which mode of brand recall do you think your brand needs? __

1. Logo designing

Create a logo that tells your brandΓÇÖs story and creates a remarkable memory in the viewers mind\.

1. Brand Guidelines

		Plan out your brand's look and feel from A\-Z with the professionals and let\.

1. Letterheads

Maintain professionalism in all your paperworks\.

1. Business Cards

If you believe that the first impression is the best impression\. Then you know what to do next\.

1. Digital Content Strategy

 		A fully sketched and analyzed plan for your brand's tone and language for its                   entire market identity\. 

__TECH LAB__

__	Website Design and Development__

We know that it's hard to find a web design company that's just as committed to your strategic goals as you are\. We're the sort of people who can't stop thinking about how you can use the web to improve your business, and we're not afraid to do some digging around online to find out exactly what you need\.

If you're looking for a web designer or developer who can build you a custom website that's tailored to your business, look no further than Sparkle Media\. We know that you want a website that's built specifically to meet your needsΓÇöand that's why we are equipped with the best web designers and developer who move with custom web development\. All our custom website developments are built from the ground up with your requirements in mind\.

We're committed to helping you design the perfect site for your business\. We take the time to learn about your business, competitors, customers, and specific needs so that your website is not only beautiful and attractive but also helpful to grow your business in a meaningful way with the targeting features\. You will get User friendly, Mobile friendly, Mobile responsive quality web design and development in Sri Lanka from our company\. One\-page websites, corporate web designs, Classified Web Development, eCommerce web development with local bank payment gateways \(Payhere Gateway or PayPal gateway\) and all what you could ask for, and that's why we work with businesses before they even have a website, so we can make sure we understand exactly what it is you're trying to accomplish\. After all, if you don't know what questions you should be asking yourself about your business when hiring someone else, then how are they supposed to help?

We also make sure we understand your target audienceΓÇöand not just from a demographic standpoint\. We want to understand how your customers think and act as well, so that when they visit your site, they feel like they've been welcomed into an ecosystem where they belong and where they'll find things that resonate with them\. It takes more than just a pretty interface and some flashy features for people to want to come back again and againΓÇöit takes a thoughtful approach that integrates marketing into every aspect of what your company does and creates memorable experiences along the way\. That's why we focus on strategy too

__	Website Optimisation__

Websites drive a brandΓÇÖs online success\. The easier it is for consumers to find and navigate a website, the more likely it is that those consumers will take action\. That action can include form fills, service calls or product purchases\. ItΓÇÖs a simple truth: a well\-optimized website equals better results for a business\.

Website optimization involves the implementation of technical and creative tactics to holistically improve a siteΓÇÖs ability to drive business goals\. Consumers bounce from a webpage in seconds if load time takes too long or the design is not mobile\-friendly\. Every bounce means a business is losing out on valuable leads\.

By identifying issues that may inhibit consumers from converting and implementing effective solutions, Silverback Strategies helps our clientsΓÇÖ websites achieve optimal performance and, ultimately, help boost sales\. Our team of experts is well\-versed in technical and creative website optimization services\. ThatΓÇÖs why businesses call Silverback when their websites arenΓÇÖt converting customers\.

Website Optimization That Drives Consumer Action

Sparkle MediaΓÇÖs website optimization service is backed up by a decade of experience in designing, developing and improving client websites through a variety of digital marketing tactics, including search engine optimization \(SEO\) and content marketing\.

Sparkle MediaΓÇÖs development team works on the backend to keep our clientsΓÇÖ websites running smoothly while our talented designers identify ways that the user experience can be improved and drive site visitors further down the sales funnel\. Our teams work in conjunction with expert content and SEO marketers to ensure websites are discoverable in the search engine results pages \(SERPs\)\.

Drive traffic  Engage consumers  Make the sale, Sparkle Media truly does it all\. WeΓÇÖre there every step of the way to make certain our clients get the best possible return on investment\.

__Software Development & Implementation__

Software Development Services are the new way to get your company off the ground\. Software development services have become more popular than ever before, and now more than ever we can help you take the time and money out of building your own software\. With our dedicated teams and staff augmentation services, we have the expertise you need to get your project done rightΓÇöand done fast\.

We offer tailor\-made software development services for startups, medium\-sized companies, and large enterprises, from dedicated teams to custom software development\. Sparkle MediaΓÇÖs Dedicated Team model of cooperation provides high\-quality software development services for our clients\. Our Dedicated Teams offer clients a simple, affordable answer to build\-up of any software development project\. Team sizes are adjusted to accommodate changing requirements and other needs\.

Staff augmentation is a staffing solution designed to provide IT expertise on an as\-needed basis\. By using an IT staff augmentation service, companies can augment their in\-house IT staff with qualified, experienced engineers on a short or long\-term basis\. Don't let your team be spread too thin by trying to do it all yourself\. Let us help you make sure that your project goes smoothly from start to finish with our dedicated teams or staff augmentation service\.

YouΓÇÖre ready to transform your idea into a reality\. 

We know that itΓÇÖs not an easy task, and weΓÇÖre here to help\. Sparkle Media has been helping businesses utilize custom software development services to turn their visions into reality\. We provide high\-quality, cost\-effective, reliable, full\-cycle bespoke software development that matches your specific needs, budget, and timeframe\. Increase your competitive advantage with a custom solution\. In todayΓÇÖs competitive business world, companies expect faster, more efficient software solutions with no quality sacrifices\. Sparkle Media provides QA & software testing services to fulfill all your quality and testing needs\.

__Life at Sparkle Media__

Life at Sparkle Media can be exciting and rewarding\. You get to work with a diverse team of people who are passionate about digital marketing and are constantly learning and innovating\. You'll be involved in the creative process of developing campaigns, creating content, and measuring results\. You'll also be exposed to the latest technologies and strategies so you can stay ahead of the competition\. The hours can be long and the work can be demanding, but the rewards can be great\. Working with Sparkle Media can be very rewarding, as you get to help businesses reach their goals and build their brand\.
